content:
# Arabian Peninsula

**Summary**: The geographic region where the study's target formation is located.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] conducted research in the arabian-peninsula to evaluate shale gas potential.

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] studied particulate matter across the Arabian Peninsula.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] Hercynian deformation modified original distribution

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] studied particulate matter across the Arabian Peninsula.

## Formations Present

- [[2015-own|Own, 2015]] Qalibah, Khuff, Unayzah, Jauf, Sarah, Qasim

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Qusaiba hot-shale is a prolific source rock across several basins in the Arabian Peninsula. ([[2015-own|Own, 2015, p. 32]])

- The study identified regional variations in PM concentration and source types (natural vs. man-made). ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 21]])
